statement: A weightless beam AB (length 6 m) is pin-supported at A (x=0) and roller-supported at B (x=6 m). A downward point load of 1200 N acts at x=4 m, and a clockwise external moment of 600 N·m is applied at x=1 m. Find the reactions at A and B.
common_student_errors: Treating the applied moment as a force and computing a moment arm for it
Forgetting that a pure couple contributes to ΣM regardless of which reference point is chosen
Sign error on the couple: clockwise couple is negative in CCW-positive convention
